water.general: Less damage than other schools, focuses on crowd control
water.ice_spells: Have freeze chance, scaling with upgrades
water.push_spells: Deal bonus physical damage if enemy hits obstacle
water.vajra_spells: Water-Space crossover. Vajra (thunderbolt/diamond) themed spells with stun, binding, and portal effects

fire.general: Moderate damage in big AoE with burning DoT. Charm/magnetizing effects from Padma (Lotus) family.
fire.burning: Stacks. Small chance to spread in melee (spreads base level only, not full stack).

air.general: Lightning spells have high damage, high cost, stun chance. Wind spells push/scatter enemies, dealing physical damage on impact. Buffs focus on ranged accuracy and speed.
air.lightning_spells: Air damage with stun chance scaling with spellpower/upgrades
air.wind_spells: Physical damage from impacts/falls, scatter to random tiles
air.stun_vs_freeze: Stun: 1 turn, save at end to break, no vulnerability. Freeze: can last longer, physical vulnerability, dispelled by fire.

space.general: Utility with teleportation, mental manipulation crossovers, illusion spells, and basic reliable damage. Magic Missile style spells are moderate and useful for everyone.
space.dagger_theme: Phurba/Nailing Dagger spells - pinning, binding, subjugating hostile forces

white.general: Healing and buffs primarily, with some damage spells effective against undead and demons who have white vulnerability. White and Black are both natural parts of the world order.
white.anti_undead_demon: White damage is especially effective against undead and demons
white.ancestral_theme: White-Black crossover focuses on respectful dealings with the dead, ancestor veneration

black.general: Debuffs, undead/demon summons, and damage spells. Black and White are both natural parts of the world order.
black.celestial_vulnerability: Celestials have 50% black vulnerability (in race stats, not spell stats)
black.summons: Summoned from nothing, not from corpses
black.curse_synergy: Many spells and upgrades benefit from debuffed targets

vine_trap.name: Vine Trap
vine_trap.description: Create a trap that roots enemies

earthen_pit.name: Earthen Pit
earthen_pit.description: Trap enemy for turns based on spellpower

petrify.name: Petrify
petrify.description: Disable enemy, resistible, lower cost than Midas Touch

stone_shell.name: Stone Shell
stone_shell.description: Protective HP barrier around target, traps but allows casting

fools_gold.name: Fool's Gold
fools_gold.description: Illusion of treasure that lures enemies

chasm.name: Chasm
chasm.description: Damage and push enemies one tile, remains as obstacle

earthen_cross.name: Earthen Cross
earthen_cross.description: Physical damage in cross pattern, 5 tiles

golden_cage.name: Golden Cage
golden_cage.description: Trap that adds gold when broken

implosion.name: Implosion
implosion.description: Massive single-target damage, scales heavily with spellpower

meteor_shower.name: Meteor Shower
meteor_shower.description: Massive fire and physical damage in large area

midas_touch.name: Midas Touch
midas_touch.description: Instant kill on failed resist, adds gold based on enemy level

herbal_remedy.name: Herbal Remedy
herbal_remedy.description: Heal minor HP, remove bleeding and poison

sacred_ground.name: Sacred Ground
sacred_ground.description: Heals and blesses allies in area

blessing_of_prithvi.name: Blessing of Prithvi
blessing_of_prithvi.description: Boost Strength and Constitution, heal minor

mudra_of_touching_the_earth.name: Mudra of Touching the Earth
mudra_of_touching_the_earth.description: Earthquake damages all enemies, heals all allies, destroys random obstacles

insect_swarm.name: Insect Swarm
insect_swarm.description: 1 physical damage per turn, disrupts mantras/rituals with focus saves

infect.name: Infect
infect.description: Enemy spawns Fungal Spawn after 3 turns dealing damage and bleed, cleansable

grave_soil.name: Grave Soil
grave_soil.description: Cursed terrain - enemies dying on it rise as allied zombies

venus_flytrap.name: Venus Flytrap
venus_flytrap.description: Summon a living, moving carnivorous plant

bone_spike.name: Bone Spike
bone_spike.description: Bone erupts from ground, physical damage, bonus vs living creatures

fungal_zombie.name: Fungal Zombie
fungal_zombie.description: Cast on corpse - rises as slow summon with high HP, low damage, poisons

blighted_ground.name: Blighted Ground
blighted_ground.description: Cursed ground debuffs all stats and poisons those standing on it

spore_explosion.name: Spore Explosion
spore_explosion.description: AoE - Infect on living creatures, Fungal Zombie on corpses

water_walking.name: Water Walking
water_walking.description: Ignore water terrain hazards, walk on water

sleet.name: Sleet
sleet.description: Terrain effect - chance to fall when walking over

mud.name: Mud
mud.description: Muddy terrain slows characters walking over it

dampening_aura.name: Dampening Aura
dampening_aura.description: Aura reduces fire damage taken by allies, extinguishes burning

fluid_form.name: Fluid Form
fluid_form.description: Immunity to physical and water damage, vulnerable to fire

ice_totem.name: Ice Totem
ice_totem.description: Static turret that shoots ice bolts with low damage but freeze chance

ghost_shoal.name: Ghost Shoal
ghost_shoal.description: 3-4 tile wide band of ghost fish sweeps battlefield, water damage + Confusion

surge.name: Surge
surge.description: Push one enemy in melee 1 tile, minor damage

rain.name: Rain
rain.description: Reduce movement and range in AoE

wave.name: Wave
wave.description: 3 tiles wide, push based on spellpower, minor damage

ripple.name: Ripple
ripple.description: Push all around caster 2-3 tiles, minor damage

hail_storm.name: Hail Storm
hail_storm.description: Ice damage + freeze chance in AoE

drown.name: Drown
drown.description: Trap in place for turns, sustained physical damage, dispellable

blizzard.name: Blizzard
blizzard.description: Ice damage + freeze chance in large AoE

cone_of_frost.name: Cone of Frost
cone_of_frost.description: Ice damage + freeze chance in cone

tsunami.name: Tsunami
tsunami.description: Long vertical line, pushes far based on spellpower, moderate damage on obstacle hit

ice_age.name: Ice Age
ice_age.description: Global freeze and ice damage to all enemies

blessed_waters.name: Blessed Waters
blessed_waters.description: Remove burning, moderate heal in AoE

rain_of_revival.name: Rain of Revival
rain_of_revival.description: Moderate heal, buff initiative, add one action in AoE

amrita.name: Amrita
amrita.description: Heal comparable to Greater Heal, death immunity for a few turns

rot_wood.name: Rot Wood
rot_wood.description: Reduce ranged attack and damage by 50%

rust_metal.name: Rust Metal
rust_metal.description: Reduce melee attack and armor by 50%

festering_wound.name: Festering Wound
festering_wound.description: Poison DoT that increases each turn

pervasive_chill.name: Pervasive Chill
pervasive_chill.description: Slow and reduce dodge in AoE

venomous_tide.name: Venomous Tide
venomous_tide.description: Wave of poisonous water, poison damage + poisoned + push

hands_of_the_drowned.name: Hands of the Drowned
hands_of_the_drowned.description: Hold enemies in AoE, water damage per turn, Strength save to escape, slowed after escape

miasma.name: Miasma
miasma.description: Persistent poison cloud, damage + poisoned + slowed

wilting_curse.name: Wilting Curse
wilting_curse.description: Major damage on failed Constitution save to all living enemies by evaporating water; 2x damage to water creatures, no damage to fire elementals/undead/constructs

plague_waters.name: Plague Waters
plague_waters.description: Disease that spreads between adjacent enemies each turn, poison damage + diseased (stat penalties + DoT)

vajra_strike.name: Vajra Strike
vajra_strike.description: A vajra falls like a meteor, water damage + stun

vajra_binding.name: Vajra Binding
vajra_binding.description: Target bound by vajra chains, rooted + silenced

vajra_mandala.name: Vajra Mandala
vajra_mandala.description: Protective circle of orbiting vajras, allies protected, enemies entering take water damage + freeze chance

vajra_gate.name: Vajra Gate
vajra_gate.description: Create a short-duration portal between two points marked by vajras

vajra_rain.name: Vajra Rain
vajra_rain.description: Multiple vajras rain down, water damage + freeze + knockdown

burning_weapon.name: Burning Weapon
burning_weapon.description: Add fire damage + burning to attacks

fan_the_flames.name: Fan the Flames
fan_the_flames.description: Increase burning damage dealt by target's attacks

tongues_of_fire.name: Tongues of Fire
tongues_of_fire.description: Lash at enemies entering melee range

magnetizing_aura.name: Magnetizing Aura
magnetizing_aura.description: Chance to charm enemies entering melee

smoke_form.name: Smoke Form
smoke_form.description: Target becomes smoke, gains evasion, can move through enemies, 25% water vulnerability

solar_form.name: Solar Form
solar_form.description: Blind and damage close enemies, fire immunity, water vulnerability

dominate.name: Dominate
dominate.description: If successful, target permanently joins party

agnideva_lord.name: Agnideva Lord
agnideva_lord.description: Summon a powerful fire spirit lord

ember.name: Ember
ember.description: Re-ignite enemies who were burning recently (within 2 turns)

spontaneous_combustion.name: Spontaneous Combustion
spontaneous_combustion.description: Burning enemy explodes, removes burning stacks

heat_ray.name: Heat Ray
heat_ray.description: Line from caster, damages all in path

ignite.name: Ignite
ignite.description: Set enemies in FoV on fire

flash_step.name: Flash Step
flash_step.description: Short-range teleport, leave fire damage at departure point

searing_orb.name: Searing Orb
searing_orb.description: Slow projectile, stays 3-4 turns, AoE fire damage + burning each turn

firestorm.name: Firestorm
firestorm.description: Large AoE, major fire damage + burning

vaporize.name: Vaporize
vaporize.description: Massive fire damage to one target

cauterize.name: Cauterize
cauterize.description: Remove bleeding, poison, disease; deal minor damage

clarity.name: Clarity
clarity.description: Remove negative mental effects, boost Awareness

cleansing_fire.name: Cleansing Fire
cleansing_fire.description: Remove negative effects, minor fire damage to target

sunrise.name: Sunrise
sunrise.description: Major fire/white damage to all enemies, heal allies

witch_fire.name: Witch Fire
witch_fire.description: Fire that spreads to nearby cursed/debuffed targets

soul_burn.name: Soul Burn
soul_burn.description: Fire DoT that deals more damage for each debuff on target

balefire.name: Balefire
balefire.description: Cursed fire that prevents resurrection, destroys corpse on kill

electrify_weapon.name: Electrify Weapon
electrify_weapon.description: Add air damage + stun chance to attacks

precision.name: Precision
precision.description: Range, accuracy, and critical boost for ranged attacks

favorable_wind.name: Favorable Wind
favorable_wind.description: Aura granting haste and precision to nearby allies

storm_lord.name: Storm Lord
storm_lord.description: Lightning aura damages attackers, flight, immunity to ranged

unseen_servant.name: Unseen Servant
unseen_servant.description: Summon an invisible servant for utility tasks

singing_birds.name: Singing Birds
singing_birds.description: Summon singing birds that buff and boost morale

apsara.name: Apsara
apsara.description: Summon an apsara that heals allies and charms enemies

gandharva_host.name: Gandharva Host
gandharva_host.description: Summon gandharvas that buff and heal allies

jump.name: Jump
jump.description: Leap to target location, ignoring terrain

shocking_grasp.name: Shocking Grasp
shocking_grasp.description: Melee-range air damage with stun chance

blessed_shot.name: Blessed Shot
blessed_shot.description: Next ranged attack is guaranteed hit with boosted damage and critical

air_bomb.name: Air Bomb
air_bomb.description: Launch enemies into air, they take fall damage and scatter to random tiles

thunderclap.name: Thunderclap
thunderclap.description: Air damage + stun chance in AoE around caster

gust_of_wind.name: Gust of Wind
gust_of_wind.description: Push enemies in cone, physical damage on obstacle impact

lightning.name: Lightning
lightning.description: High air damage with stun chance

ball_lightning.name: Ball Lightning
ball_lightning.description: Persistent orb dealing lightning damage as it passes, explodes on obstacle or duration end

chain_lightning.name: Chain Lightning
chain_lightning.description: Lightning that chains to nearby enemies, damage reduces per chain

tornado.name: Tornado
tornado.description: Persistent tornado that moves randomly, launching and scattering enemies

lightning_form.name: Lightning Form
lightning_form.description: Immunity to air, 50% physical immunity, 50% water vulnerability, flight, lightning aura damages and stuns nearby

thin_air.name: Thin Air
thin_air.description: Immunity to physical damage, cannot deal physical, major speed boost

thunderstorm.name: Thunderstorm
thunderstorm.description: Major air damage with stun chance in large AoE

void_gust.name: Void Gust
void_gust.description: Wind carrying void energy, push + space damage

phase_wind.name: Phase Wind
phase_wind.description: Allies in area gain 25% physical damage negation

dimensional_rift.name: Dimensional Rift
dimensional_rift.description: Tear in space scatters enemies to random locations

radiance.name: Radiance
radiance.description: Aura heals allies, stuns enemies in melee

second_wind.name: Second Wind
second_wind.description: Grant one additional action this turn

breath_of_heaven.name: Breath of Heaven
breath_of_heaven.description: Resurrect all fallen allies with partial HP

poisonous_cloud.name: Poisonous Cloud
poisonous_cloud.description: Cloud that damages and poisons enemies inside

suffocate.name: Suffocate
suffocate.description: Silence + physical damage over time, Constitution save

deathfog.name: Deathfog
deathfog.description: Cloud that instantly kills on failed Constitution save, damage otherwise

decoy.name: Decoy
decoy.description: Create illusory target that draws attacks, HP scales with spellpower

blur.name: Blur
blur.description: Shifting image grants dodge bonus, attacks have miss chance

invisibility.name: Invisibility
invisibility.description: Target becomes invisible, broken by offensive action

mirror_image.name: Mirror Image
mirror_image.description: Create illusory copies, attacks may hit copies instead

magic_mirror.name: Magic Mirror
magic_mirror.description: Chance to reflect spells back to caster (spellpower vs spellpower)

mantric_armor.name: Mantric Armor
mantric_armor.description: HP shield based on spellpower, 25% elemental resistance, must be destroyed before caster takes damage

false_terrain.name: False Terrain
false_terrain.description: Make area look different - hide traps, create illusory walls

dimensional_anchor.name: Dimensional Anchor
dimensional_anchor.description: Lock down area - no teleportation, phasing, or fleeing for anyone

trickster_mask.name: Trickster Mask
trickster_mask.description: Summon floating mask - low HP, high dodge, blinks around casting CC and mental spells

puppet.name: Puppet
puppet.description: Summon animated puppet with White and Black magic

nailing_dagger.name: Nailing Dagger
nailing_dagger.description: Summon a ritual dagger spirit that pins and binds enemies

eldritch_spawn.name: Eldritch Spawn
eldritch_spawn.description: Summon a mass of tentacles and eyes from the Outer Night

troupe_of_puppets.name: Troupe of Puppets
troupe_of_puppets.description: Summon a troupe of animated puppets

dagger_swarm.name: Dagger Swarm
dagger_swarm.description: Summon a swarm of ritual daggers that attack enemies

eldritch_guardian.name: Eldritch Guardian
eldritch_guardian.description: Summon a powerful being from the Outer Night

nail_the_shadow.name: Nail the Shadow
nail_the_shadow.description: Pin enemy's shadow - rooted, takes damage if they try to move

mana_flare.name: Mana Flare
mana_flare.description: Remove some mana and deal space damage

stake_the_threshold.name: Stake the Threshold
stake_the_threshold.description: Place dagger on ground, enemies crossing take space damage and are slowed

phantasm.name: Phantasm
phantasm.description: Illusion of enemy's fear, space damage + fear

banishing_stake.name: Banishing Stake
banishing_stake.description: Extra damage to demons/spirits, instantly destroys summons

teleport.name: Teleport
teleport.description: Teleport oneself or another to target location

wrathful_binding.name: Wrathful Binding
wrathful_binding.description: Dagger orbits target, continuous damage, can't teleport or flee

intervention.name: Intervention
intervention.description: Flee combat, teleport party to safety

psychic_tremor.name: Psychic Tremor
psychic_tremor.description: Major space damage in large AoE

mana_drain.name: Mana Drain
mana_drain.description: Drain significant mana from target, transfer to caster

nail_the_sun.name: Nail the Sun
nail_the_sun.description: Pin time itself in place - only caster can act for 1 turn. As Tilopa once nailed the sun to drink till sundown.

planar_shift.name: Planar Shift
planar_shift.description: Move to same spot in different world, if unlocked

portal.name: Portal
portal.description: Establish permanent portal between two map locations

spellstrike.name: Spellstrike
spellstrike.description: Strip magical defenses, damage increased per buff removed

shimmer.name: Shimmer
shimmer.description: Minor dodge buff, attackers are briefly dazzled (accuracy penalty on next attack)

freedom.name: Freedom
freedom.description: Remove paralysis, slow, root, and earthbound effects

sanctuary.name: Sanctuary
sanctuary.description: Target can't be targeted or target enemies, breaks on offensive action

invulnerability.name: Invulnerability
invulnerability.description: Complete immunity to damage for short duration

confusion.name: Confusion
confusion.description: Target moves randomly, can't act intentionally

forgetfulness.name: Forgetfulness
forgetfulness.description: Enemy can move but can't attack or cast for 1 turn

chaos.name: Chaos
chaos.description: Target moves AND attacks/casts randomly - dangerous to everyone

mamo.name: Mamo
mamo.description: Summon a mamo hag that attacks with Black, Space, and poison magic

liberate.name: Liberate
liberate.description: Instant death on failed Focus save if below HP threshold (scales with spellpower), 50% max HP damage on passed save

soothing_presence.name: Soothing Presence
soothing_presence.description: Aura that heals allies each turn

pacify.name: Pacify
pacify.description: Chance to make enemy disengage from combat

song_of_peace.name: Song of Peace
song_of_peace.description: Strong pacify effect on all enemies in range

divine_inspiration.name: Divine Inspiration
divine_inspiration.description: Considerably buff target's two highest stats

aura_of_blessing.name: Aura of Blessing
aura_of_blessing.description: Aura that grants Blessed to nearby allies

divine_champion.name: Divine Champion
divine_champion.description: Considerably buff all of target's stats

guiding_light.name: Guiding Light
guiding_light.description: Summon minor spirit that provides vision and small buff

kinnara.name: Kinnara
kinnara.description: Summon a kinnara - man-bird hybrid, fast, defensive, support

godling.name: Godling
godling.description: Summon a godling - small luminous humanoid in silks, heals and buffs, dissipates into light

host_of_kinnaras.name: Host of Kinnaras
host_of_kinnaras.description: Summon several kinnaras with healing, ranged, and melee capabilities

smite.name: Smite
smite.description: White damage, bonus vs undead and demons

cure.name: Cure
cure.description: Heal minor HP, roll to dispel negative effects

turn_undead.name: Turn Undead
turn_undead.description: Destroy weak undead, cause fear in strong undead (Focus save). Does not affect undead allies.

dispel.name: Dispel
dispel.description: Remove all magical effects from target

holy_light.name: Holy Light
holy_light.description: AoE white damage, bonus vs undead and demons

rejuvenate.name: Rejuvenate
rejuvenate.description: Completely heal and remove all negative effects

resurrect.name: Resurrect
resurrect.description: Raise dead ally with full HP

divine_wrath.name: Divine Wrath
divine_wrath.description: Major AoE white damage, devastating to undead and demons

converse_with_the_dead.name: Converse with the Dead
converse_with_the_dead.description: Speak with a corpse to gain information

ancestral_guidance.name: Ancestral Guidance
ancestral_guidance.description: Gain insight from ancestors, temporary Awareness and Focus buff

ancestral_spirit.name: Ancestral Spirit
ancestral_spirit.description: Summon an ancestral spirit to fight alongside you

death_rites.name: Death Rites
death_rites.description: Lay corpse to rest (prevents raising), nearby allies receive ancestor's blessing

lifelink.name: Lifelink
lifelink.description: Gain 50% of damage dealt as HP

pain_mirror.name: Pain Mirror
pain_mirror.description: Deal 50% of damage taken back to attacker

funeral_pyre.name: Funeral Pyre
funeral_pyre.description: Corpse disappears in white/fire explosion, damages all enemies nearby, bonus vs undead

ancestral_vengeance.name: Ancestral Vengeance
ancestral_vengeance.description: When an ally dies, gain attack and damage buff for several turns

karmic_bond.name: Karmic Bond
karmic_bond.description: Link two allies, both receive 75% of any healing to either

honored_dead.name: Honored Dead
honored_dead.description: Summon a host of buffed ancestral spirits

eternal_vow.name: Eternal Vow
eternal_vow.description: When target dies, they return next turn with 20% HP

blood_hunger.name: Blood Hunger
blood_hunger.description: Buff that grants lifesteal on all attacks

doom.name: Doom
doom.description: Target dies after X turns unless cleansed

pervasive_rot.name: Pervasive Rot
pervasive_rot.description: Debuff all attributes and deal black damage over time

imp.name: Imp
imp.description: Summon an imp - flying, high dodge, low damage, annoying

vampire_bats.name: Vampire Bats
vampire_bats.description: Summon a swarm of vampire bats

vetala.name: Vetala
vetala.description: Summon a vetala - casts Black, Fire, and one random element, has vampiric attacks

mara.name: Mara
mara.description: Summon a mara - black devil with mental manipulation, illusions, and summoning

undead_yogi.name: Undead Yogi
undead_yogi.description: Summon an undead yogi - lich-like caster with Black and various elemental magic

daughter_of_mara.name: Daughter of Mara
daughter_of_mara.description: Summon a daughter of Mara - charms, dominates, casts mental debuffs and illusions

undead_host.name: Undead Host
undead_host.description: Summon a host of powerful undead

imp_collector.name: Imp Collector
imp_collector.description: Summon an imp collector that constantly spawns imps

death_bolt.name: Death Bolt
death_bolt.description: Black damage, if it kills the target, raise them as allied zombie

behind_you.name: Behind You
behind_you.description: Teleport directly behind target enemy. 'While you sit here making plans, the Lord of Death stands behind you, smacking his lips.'

hands_of_the_damned.name: Hands of the Damned
hands_of_the_damned.description: Black damage and fear in AoE

steal_blessings.name: Steal Blessings
steal_blessings.description: Remove buffs from enemy and gain them yourself

shroud_of_darkness.name: Shroud of Darkness
shroud_of_darkness.description: Obscure vision in area, easier stealth, ranged attack range cut 50%

exploit_weakness.name: Exploit Weakness
exploit_weakness.description: Black damage, bonus damage for each debuff on target

death_shock.name: Death Shock
death_shock.description: Major black damage, if it kills, same damage to next nearest enemy

black_lightning.name: Black Lightning
black_lightning.description: Black damage + blind, like lightning but less damage

voidstorm.name: Voidstorm
voidstorm.description: Major black damage in large AoE
